requirement_topic.en: Landsnet Grid-Connection and Market Participation Review
requirement_topic.zh: Landsnet 并网与市场参与审查
requirement_topic.zht: Landsnet 併網與市場參與審查

summary.en: Battery projects in Iceland are reviewed through Landsnet and Orkustofnun-facing connection and system operation frameworks based on the connection point, capacity band, and project role. For Iceland-facing BESS files, provide interconnection application data, study results, metering and protection coordination evidence, dispatch interface assumptions, commissioning and acceptance records, and clear model-level scope mapping before energisation.
summary.zh: 冰岛储能项目按接入点、容量区间和项目角色，需通过 Landsnet 与 Orkustofnun 相关框架进行审查。面向冰岛的 BESS 文件应提交接入申请资料、研究结果、计量与保护配合证据、调度接口假设、调试和验收记录，以及型号级适用范围映射。
summary.zht: 冰島儲能項目按接入點、容量區間和專案角色，需透過 Landsnet 與 Orkustofnun 相關框架進行審查。面向冰島的 BESS 檔案應提交接入申請資料、研究結果、計量與保護配合證據、調度介面假設、調試與驗收紀錄，以及型號級適用範圍映射。

standards_or_laws: Orkustofnun electricity and storage policy implementation framework
IEC 62933-5-2 for international BESS interconnection safety evidence

summary.en: China often applies GB/T 36558 and utility-specific interconnection and acceptance procedures for electrochemical storage. Those materials are useful for technical comparison but do not substitute Iceland Landsnet acceptance and project-market pathway obligations.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用 GB/T 36558 及电网企业的接入与验收流程进行电化学储能接入。该类资料对技术比较有参考价值，但不能取代冰岛 Landsnet 的验收及项目市场路径义务。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用 GB/T 36558 及電網企業的接入與驗收流程進行電化學儲能接入。該類資料對技術比較有參考價值，但不能取代冰島 Landsnet 的驗收及項目市場路徑義務。

standards_or_laws: China grid-company interconnection and acceptance procedures

gap.en: The gap is Iceland-specific pathway definition: clarify storage classification for dispatch and balancing, protection and anti-islanding settings, fault ride-through expectations, import/imported-reactive-power settings, and local metering/tariff alignment at each planned site.
gap.zh: 差距在于冰岛特定路径界定，包括对并网调度和调频调压行为的储能分类、保护与防孤岛参数、故障穿越期望、无功/有功设置、以及各站点当地计量与计费对接。
gap.zht: 差距在於冰島特定路徑界定，包括對併網調度和調頻調壓行為的儲能分類、保護與防孤島參數、故障穿越預期、無功／有功設定，以及各站點當地計量與計費對接。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Landsnet connection application, dispatch participation, metering, or approval route requires project-specific interconnection documentation
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China GB/T interconnection materials are not Iceland grid-operator approval documents

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep BESS product safety and grid interconnection packages separate. Iceland projects require Landsnet/Orkustofnun pathway confirmation before energisation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品安全资料与并网材料应分开处理。冰岛项目需在送电前确认 Landsnet/Orkustofnun 的接入路径要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品安全資料與併網材料應分開處理。冰島項目需在送電前確認 Landsnet/Orkustofnun 的接入路徑要求。
